description.zh: 如果你有兴趣的话，我这还有更多的活儿。你应该知道，我一直在帮助供养那些来不及离开、只能呆在庇护所里的平民。事实上，你正是在为了我这个目标而战斗，去帮助无辜的人们生存下去，直到这场噩梦结束，或者他们成功撤离。你的所作所为让我惊觉——你起码还是一个正常人，而不是像大多数来到我这儿的年轻人一样，完全丧失人性，堕落为了怪物。我请求你再帮我个忙吧，我需要吗啡，当然不是卖给吸毒者。小伙子，毕竟我是个医生，发过誓言的那种。在你们持续不断的交火中，流弹、手雷破片等误伤了许多平民，这其中有妇女、老人和孩子。他们不是战场硬汉，不应该也不能忍受这样的痛苦，只能靠咬着步枪背带挺过去。据我所知，USEC过去常在他们的SUV里携带这种一次性注射器，请给我找来至少5剂吗啡。
description.en: There is more work if you are interested. I think you have already understood that I support the civilians remaining in shelters, who, unfortunately, didn't have the time to get out of the perimeter. In fact, all your fights are just a means of achieving the goal for me. And the goal is to help innocent people to survive until the possible end of this nightmare. Or until the evacuation. You strike me as a more-or-less normal person, not an utterly devolved monster yet like most of your peers who come to me. Therefore, I shall ask you. I need morphine. And not for sale to drug addicts. I am a doctor, after all, young man, and gave the oath. Many civilians are injured because of your constant firefights. Stray bullets, grenade fragments. And there are women, and the elderly, and children. And they are not combat-hardened thugs, they can not, and should not, endure such pain, biting on the rifle sling. I know that USEC used to carry supplies of single-use syringes in their SUVs. Get me at least several of those.
